name: doctor: a JSON file that merely mentions AWSTemplateFormatVersion inside a string value (not as a top-level key) is not treated as CloudFormation IaC (false-positive regression)
command: mkdir -p repo && printf '{"about":"this fixture mentions AWSTemplateFormatVersion but is not a template"}\n' > repo/notes.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/doctor.sh" --check cloud-conventions --root repo
